name: 400 followers??
description:
I... actually can't believe it.

It hasn't even been a year yet, but I've already managed to garner 400 followers. That's 400 separate accounts, mind you, that bothered to go find my bots, click on my creators page, and press the follow button.

Are my bots that good? Or is it my CSS page? What is it in particular that's making you all follow me exactly? Cause I really want to know.

Well... since you bothered to come onto here to read this announcement, I suppose I'll just reveal to you all what I've been planning.

Just to make it special, right?

So, I was actually planning on a neat little ARG in the future to celebrate 500 followers, aka half a thousand. I want it to be TMOSTH themed, but if I don't reach 500 followers anytime soon, I'm planning on doing it in May. So...yeah. Shadic May is returning, in a way. I just need to plan out the secrets.

Also, I'm planning on making more bots in December that I plan to update you about once I'm finished with Neo Metal and all, considering I want to branch out, too.

And uhh... what else do people do for follower milestones? Oh, right. I guess I don't mind doing a little Q&A for now just to commemorate this day. So, I created this form for you guys.

Of course - Feel free to ask in the comments if you prefer it, but if you want to stay an anonymous lurker that doesn't want to reveal their identity to me, feel free to use the Google form. Just... don't make the questions oddly personal and/or inappropriate. Thanks.

Oh, almost forgot! Time for the creators I want you all to check out, since I don't want to make this all about me. (This bot's list is going to be a bit different, though. I've since lost friendly relations with some of the previous creators...)

Profile of @Retirement In Peace

Profile of @Endjriejdndn

Profile of @怒りのシェンロン
creator: Shadic_
